description.value:
A pipe carved from a single dragon fang, the stem coiled into a serpentine dragon shape. Smoke drawn through it carries the breath of the original beast — and a measure of its constitution.

Functions only with substances designed to be burned in this pipe.

Attunement. Requires attunement.

Iron Lungs of the Wyrm. While attuned, a number of times per day equal to your proficiency bonus, you may automatically succeed on a Constitution saving throw against addiction to an inhaled substance burned in this pipe's bowl. Uses recover at the end of a long rest.

effects.name: Dubious Pipe — Save Modifier
effects.description: Grants automatic success on Constitution saving throws against addiction to inhaled substances burned in the Dubious Pipe. Uses recover at the end of a long rest, tracked on the pipe's native uses pool.
